answers.label: I like solving complex problems and thinking analytically
Outdoors or on-site (field, site, lab, clinic)
Balanced — good pay and meaningful work

steps.title: Foundations
steps.objective: Build essential groundwork for your career

milestones.title: Complete Foundations
milestones.description: Achieve the objective 'Build essential groundwork for your career' by completing tasks such as: (Examiner-assessed flight tests).

tasks.title: (Examiner-assessed flight tests)
tasks.description: Complete examiner-assessed flight tests and oral examinations for your instructor rating

children.title: Industry Fundamentals
children.objective: Understand the core concepts of flight instructor

resources.title: King Schools Flight Instructor Written Exam Course
Sporty's Flight Instructor Written Test Prep

Becoming a Certified Flight Instructor (CFI) Guide by Epic Flight Academy
ATP Flight School - Flight Instructor Career Path

milestones.title: Complete Industry Fundamentals
milestones.description: Achieve the objective 'Understand the core concepts of flight instructor' by completing tasks such as: (Earn a commercial), (A flight instructor).

tasks.title: (Earn a commercial)
tasks.description: Earn a Commercial Pilot License (CPL) or equivalent and accumulate sufficient flight hours

tasks.title: (A flight instructor)
tasks.description: Complete a Flight Instructor (FI) or CFI certificate course covering instructional technique

children.objective: Set up your professional workspace

milestones.description: Achieve the objective 'Set up your professional workspace' by completing tasks such as: (Learn adult learning).

tasks.description: Learn adult learning theory, lesson planning, and how to teach flight skills progressively
